title: 2025176Wetjhyu514
summary:
Main
• Black Swans Everywhere as VLCCs Surge - The most severe conflict in the Middle East in decades has introduced considerable instability into the oil markets, which in turn has impacted tanker shipping operations. The ongoing war between Israel and Iran has significantly heightened risks to oil supplies, while the trajectory of the situation remains uncertain in the coming days and weeks. Given that the broader Middle East accounts for more than 25% of seaborne oil, such increased uncertainty is to be expected.
